roles.name: Master Fry Cook
roles.description: Architect of the perfect Krabby Patty stack — designs the over-arching solution and guards the secret formula.

roles.name: Krusty Krab Manager
roles.description: Wrangles the crew, the timeline, and the cash register — answers to Mr. Krabs.

roles.name: Register Keeper
roles.description: Tends fields, layouts, and permissions like a clean cash drawer at end of shift.

roles.name: Grill-Side Engineer
roles.description: Forges Apex and LWC at the hot grill — turns out features at lunch-rush pace.

roles.name: Head Chef of the West Reef
roles.description: Senior galley boss across the reef — sets the standard and trains the next round of cooks.

roles.name: Senior Reef Consultant
roles.description: Veteran of many a lunch rush — leads complex configuration with calm fins.

roles.name: Reef Apprentice Consultant
roles.description: Hustles between tickets and tables — carries discovery and config under the senior chef's eye.

roles.name: Pneumatic Tube Architect
roles.description: Designs the great pneumatic tubes between Krusty Krab POS and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Senior Tube Engineer
roles.description: Lays the brass piping of APIs, middleware, and event flows under the Tube Architect's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Tube Engineer
roles.description: Learns the craft — webhooks, batch jobs, callouts, and the proper cleanup of leaky valves.

roles.name: Health Inspector
roles.description: Sniffs out bugs before they reach the customer — keeps the kitchen squeaky clean.

roles.name: Bikini Bottom Crier
roles.description: Lifts the megaphone for product and message — leads all marketing voyages.

roles.name: Senior Billboard Strategist
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — plots the placement of every neon sign on Conch Street.

roles.name: Flyer Distribution Specialist
roles.description: Carries the campaign to every mailbox and pineapple in town.

roles.name: Order-Taker Analyst
roles.description: Takes the order, repeats it back, and writes it down so the cook gets it right the first time.

roles.name: Senior Grill Foreman
roles.description: Veteran USA-side cook — owns the most complex Apex and the deep grill.

roles.name: Junior Reef Cook
roles.description: Newest hand on deck — learns the menu, the platform, and the crew.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Atlantis & Flying Dutchman — Legacy Realms Integration

krusty-krab.themedRole: Head Chef of the West Reef

atlantis-flying-dutchman.themedRole: Head Chef of the West Reef

krusty-krab.name: Open the Order Window
krusty-krab.description: Discovery sign-off — the doors swing open for the morning crowd.

krusty-krab.name: Forge the Spatula
krusty-krab.description: Build kickoff: the master spatula is forged for the grill.

krusty-krab.name: Mr. Krabs' Coin Audit
krusty-krab.description: Mid-project gate: every penny accounted for under Krabs' watchful eye.

krusty-krab.name: Friday Rush Invoice
krusty-krab.description: Phase invoice trigger: Friday's takings tallied and billed.

krusty-krab.name: Employee of the Month
krusty-krab.description: Go-Live: SpongeBob earns the plaque once again.

krusty-krab.name: Closing Time Hand-off
krusty-krab.description: Hyper-care close: keys handed to Squidward for the night shift.

chum-bucket.name: Plankton's Master Plan
chum-bucket.description: Project kickoff: the latest scheme is unveiled to Karen.

chum-bucket.name: Karen Boots Up
chum-bucket.description: Build phase: the mainframe hums to life.

chum-bucket.name: Recipe Heist Rehearsal
chum-bucket.description: UAT gate: dry-run of the Krabby Patty formula heist.

chum-bucket.name: Chum Bucket Grand Opening
chum-bucket.description: Go-Live: the doors open and the customers... arrive.

chum-bucket.name: Karen's Quiet Reboot
chum-bucket.description: Hyper-care close: Karen back to standby.

chum-bucket.name: Final Scheme Invoice
chum-bucket.description: Final invoice from the Chum Bucket — bill the Krabs anyway.

jellyfish-fields.name: First Net Cast
jellyfish-fields.description: Discovery: jellyfish census begins at dawn.

jellyfish-fields.name: Sandy's Field Review
jellyfish-fields.description: Solution review with the resident scientist.

jellyfish-fields.name: Wildlife Reserve Opens
jellyfish-fields.description: Go-Live: the reserve welcomes its first naturalist tour.

jellyfish-fields.name: Migration Season Close
jellyfish-fields.description: Project close: the jellyfish move on to deeper meadows.

jellyfish-fields.name: Reserve Funding Invoice
jellyfish-fields.description: Final invoice from the conservation board.

atlantis-flying-dutchman.name: Royal Audience
atlantis-flying-dutchman.description: Kickoff: an audience with King Neptune in his throne room.

atlantis-flying-dutchman.name: Trident Calibration
atlantis-flying-dutchman.description: Discovery: the king's trident tuned to the new platform.

atlantis-flying-dutchman.name: Ghost Ship Boarding
atlantis-flying-dutchman.description: Build: the Flying Dutchman's manifests linked into the stack.

atlantis-flying-dutchman.name: Atlantean Acceptance
atlantis-flying-dutchman.description: UAT acceptance: gifts of the realm bestowed on each crew member.

atlantis-flying-dutchman.name: Crowning of the New System
atlantis-flying-dutchman.description: Go-Live + handoff: the realms join the modern age.

atlantis-flying-dutchman.name: Royal Recompense
atlantis-flying-dutchman.description: Final invoice — paid in pearls and doubloons.

Squidward Tentacles.notes: Clarinet recital at the Bikini Bottom Conservatory.

Pearl Krabs.notes: Mall day with the girls — non-negotiable.

Sandy Cheeks.notes: Texas Rodeo — riding home for the weekend.

French Narrator.notes: Recording sabbatical — a documentary on land.

Flying Dutchman.notes: Haunting tour of the seven seas — annual.

Mindy.notes: Mermaid envoy mission to Bikini Bottom.
